name: Phase 9 Closed portfolio and retrospectives requirements matrix

rows.requirement: Closure checklist and closure workflow domain
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Closure workflow reset/readback cleanup must be proven by E2E-080 before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 product implementation has not started. Phase contract/matrix/verifier support is being established first by P9-000 before closure workflow code can be implemented.

rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Snapshot creation/stability cleanup must be proven by E2E-080 and E2E-081 before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 product implementation has not started. Snapshot domain and fixture reset/readback do not exist yet.

rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Snapshot readback, immutability denial, and reset cleanup must be proven before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 snapshot readback API is not implemented yet; E2E-081/E2E-082 are still planned.

rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Trend calculation reset/readback and snapshot-source proof must be added before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 trend engine is not implemented yet; snapshot-based closed portfolio metrics are unavailable.

rows.requirement: Lessons learned and retrospective insight model
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Insight handled-state and audit/reset cleanup must be proven before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 lessons/insight model is not implemented yet; no governed retrospective action can be linked to insights.

rows.requirement: Closed portfolio and trends API/read models
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. API readback and permission cleanup evidence must be added before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 closed portfolio/trends API does not exist yet; E2E-082 is still planned.

rows.requirement: Closed portfolio and retrospective trends UI
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. UI reload/refetch and reset cleanup must be proven by component tests and E2E-082 before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 closed portfolio/trends UI is not implemented yet; no browser evidence exists.

rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Preview/apply, audit/action readback, future-template-version readback, and reset cleanup must be proven before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 template-improvement action path is not implemented yet; E2E-083 is still planned.

rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Phase 9 fixture reset must restore closure status, snapshots, insights, template actions, audit/action logs, and template versions before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 deterministic fixtures and executable E2E-080..083 are not implemented yet.

rows.requirement: Phase 9 verification matrix and exit gate
evidence: P9-000 creates the phase contract, initial blocked matrix, and verifier support so later implementation rows have a finite exit gate.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation. Strict P9 phase exit requires E2E-080..083 cleanup/reset evidence before verification.
rows.blocker: P9 phase exit cannot be verified until P9-001..P9-009 are implemented and E2E-080..083 pass.
